use std::fs::File;
use std::io::{Read, Write};

fn transform_data(input_path: &str, output_path: &str) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    // BAD: uses temp file as intermediate between streaming transforms
    let mut input = File::open(input_path)?;
    let mut raw = Vec::new();
    input.read_to_end(&mut raw)?;

    let temp_path = format!("{}.tmp", output_path);
    {
        let mut temp_file = File::create(&temp_path)?;
        for chunk in raw.chunks(1024) {
            let transformed: Vec<u8> = chunk.iter().map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1)).collect();
            temp_file.write_all(&transformed)?;
        }
    }

    let mut temp_file = File::open(&temp_path)?;
    let mut transformed = Vec::new();
    temp_file.read_to_end(&mut transformed)?;

    let mut output = File::create(output_path)?;
    output.write_all(&transformed)?;
    std::fs::remove_file(&temp_path)?;

    Ok(())
}
